events.summary: Phase 0 Research opened — Garmin Connect health-data integration (Task 10 split, separate-feature per operator decision)

Research approved → PRD. Operator decision: Tier 1 (HealthKit relay) only for v1; Tier 2 direct-API deferred (demand-gated). Both Garmin+Fitbit advance together; shared Data-Sources Settings surface + AIInputAdapter contract.
PRD approved → Tasks. Garmin carries the SHARED foundation (DataSourcesScreen + AIInputAdapter source-detection protocol) that Fitbit depends on. Shared tasks.md approach.

Tasks → UX. ux-spec.md written for shared Data Sources screen; /ux preflight passed (all cited symbols verified: SettingsDetailScaffold/SectionCard/ActionLabel/BadgeView, EmptyStateView, HealthKitService.isAuthorized, AIInputAdapter + tokens). Placement: row under HealthDevicesSettingsScreen → dedicated DataSourcesScreen. T6 done.
